action: ADR-0046 Layer 3 (design pass first — W5/CE-wave candidate, do NOT build without an approved slice plan): loop self-deploy via binary re-exec at cycle boundary. At each cycle boundary, if tracked go/evolve differs from the running binary's baked-in identity (version.commit), boot-smoke the new binary (evolve doctor boot path); on success exec into it resuming the batch (checkpoint/resume infra, hardened soak #6); on smoke failure keep current binary + file defect. Gate EVOLVE_SELF_DEPLOY=off|shadow|enforce (shadow logs would-exec), one generation per cycle (no exec loops), SELF_SHA re-pin on exec. Motivation: gates run in-process — no cycle can repair the running batch (incident 2026-06-12: cycle 302 carried the fix for the gate that killed it; even a shipped fix could not reach the running loop). Cycle ships already commit the rebuilt binary (cycle 298 did), so Layers 2+3 make gate-defect incidents self-heal end-to-end: fail -> instinct demotes gate to shadow -> next cycle ships fix solo (blocker rule) -> boundary re-exec -> following cycle runs fixed gate at enforce. Also closes the stale-binary defect class (cycle-261). Natural home: CE fleet supervisor (worker restart on new binary is native there).
